items.title: [负面] I'd like to recommend it more than I'd not recomme...
items.summary:
I'd like to recommend it more than I'd not recommend it. 

But this game would be way better if it was not a gacha but instead a full paid game. 

And following the story is super exhausting due to the translation being made by gpt.

items.title:
[正面] bloodborne waifu tcg with jungian characteristics
...
items.summary:
bloodborne waifu tcg with jungian characteristics

finally a gacha which has char design i can get genuinely behind. f2p is quite fair and decent from what i can tell at this point of progress. fomo isn't much there imho.
gameplay is fun enough to enjoy it in just tiny measures which is good for gacha/daily login games specifically.
i don't mind chat gpt translations as much as others but i also don't pay attention to the story much and it's enough to explain card fx, interactions etc.
only thing currently which is meh is that the game progress is linked with the steam acc (i assume) and there is no way to carry it over into ea-based android/ios clients but i hope they work on that. 
_edit: crossplay on phone is now (4nov24) possible, u can get the apk from the official website but the game will also be available on playstore/ios soon from what i gather 

[posted originally here: https://backloggd.com/u/purpleskies8/review/2053008/]

items.title: [负面] 难忘今宵是一款出新角色的全是限定ssr，抽十六个角色满命，抽三个角色技能升级，抽七个大招升级，抽十二...
items.summary: 难忘今宵是一款出新角色的全是限定ssr，抽十六个角色满命，抽三个角色技能升级，抽七个大招升级，抽十二个等级上限提升，专武也16个满命，一个人有两个专武框，只有叠满其中一个ssr武器才能装另一个ssr武器不然只能装sr，限定池只能歪常驻角色，歪不了其他限定，限定抽和常驻抽分开，常驻抽获取简单但是限定抽非常少，一个版本送20限定抽（所有角色池30抽小保底，90抽大保底），官方就是个草台班子，不重视玩家体验，随意削弱人权角色，导致氪佬融号，人权池子连发，连出混沌通用强力角色骗氪，不加强其他界域，更新时服务器版本错误导致限定活动和人权角色池子提前两个月出，Steam服更新误删掉玩家数据，bug一堆，反馈后又不修，更新字体反向优化打牌体验，策划进玩家私群被嘴一两句就破防退群，缩回官群当自己的土皇帝，群里大杀特杀不让玩家建私群，还在群里面哭惨求好评，策划口口声声说猫来承受，猫来背负，真说到策划人品和能力有问题，却捂嘴不让人说，甚至大兴文字狱把寥寥无几的攻略者踢出dc社群的游戏。你们有这么好的游戏体验吗，真是校校又猫猫啊
